zh: 众所周知，锻炼对健康有益。
en: It is known that exercise is good for health.

zh: 很明显他在说谎。
en: It is obvious that he is lying.

zh: 重要的是我们要团结一致。
en: It is important that we stay united.

zh: 令人惊讶的是她通过了考试。
en: It is surprising that she passed the exam.

zh: 很遗憾他不能来。
en: It is a pity that he cannot come.

zh: 他是否诚实是个问题。
en: Whether he is honest is a question.

zh: 她能否成功取决于她的努力。
en: Whether she can succeed depends on her effort.

zh: 他是否来还不确定。
en: Whether he will come is still uncertain.

zh: 他们是否同意还有待观察。
en: Whether they agree remains to be seen.

zh: 她能否按时完成任务是个问题。
en: Whether she can finish the task on time is a question.

zh: 事实是他从未去过那里。
en: The fact is that he has never been there.

zh: 问题是我们没有足够的时间。
en: The problem is that we do not have enough time.

zh: 真相是她一直在说谎。
en: The truth is that she has been lying.

zh: 好消息是他已经康复了。
en: The good news is that he has recovered.

zh: 结果是他们赢得了比赛。
en: The result is that they won the game.

zh: 他已经离开的消息让我们震惊。
en: The news that he had left shocked us.

zh: 她会来的希望越来越渺茫。
en: The hope that she would come was fading.

zh: 他们会成功的想法激励了大家。
en: The idea that they would succeed inspired everyone.

zh: 地球是圆的这一事实是众所周知的。
en: The fact that the earth is round is well known.

zh: 他会回来的承诺让她感到安慰。
en: The promise that he would return comforted her.

zh: 他说了什么让大家都笑了。
en: What he said made everyone laugh.

zh: 她做的事情让我们感到骄傲。
en: What she did made us proud.

zh: 他们讨论的内容非常重要。
en: What they discussed was very important.

zh: 我不知道他在想什么。
en: I do not know what he is thinking.

zh: 她不明白为什么他离开了。
en: She does not understand why he left.

zh: 我们不知道他们什么时候会回来。
en: We do not know when they will come back.

zh: 他问我住在哪里。
en: He asked me where I lived.

zh: 她想知道他是否快乐。
en: She wanted to know if he was happy.

zh: 问题是我们该怎么办。
en: The question is what we should do.

zh: 他能否成功取决于他是否努力。
en: Whether he succeeds depends on whether he works hard.
